options.title: The role of the parameter landscape in Hartree–Fock quantum computing benchmarks
options.author: Ruben Van der Stichelen
options.abstract: An in-depth investigation into parameter landscape characteristics in Hartree–Fock quantum computing benchmarks, exploring optimization challenges, convergence, and performance thresholds.

options.title: InP Quantum Dots: from Atomistic Reconstruction to Opto-Electronic Properties
options.author: Norick De Vlamynck
options.abstract: Exploring indium phosphide (InP) quantum dots through atomistic reconstruction techniques and analyzing their corresponding opto-electronic signatures and potential applications.

options.title: Improving Untargeted Metabolomic Analysis in HIV-Infected Plasma Through Miniaturized Reversed-Phase Chromatography
options.author: Lander Iterbeke
options.abstract: Methodologies and improvements for untargeted metabolomic screening of HIV-infected plasma utilizing state-of-the-art miniaturized reversed-phase high-performance liquid chromatography.

options.title: Combining Per-Aqueous and Chiral Reversed-Phase Separation Modes Towards a Comprehensive Two-Dimensional LC Platform for Amino Acid Analysis
options.author: José Meneses
options.abstract: Developing a multi-dimensional liquid chromatography platform that integrates per-aqueous and chiral reversed-phase systems to provide highly comprehensive amino acid separations.

options.title: Hide and Seek - Amide Rotation-induced Chirality Hidden in Plain Sight
options.author: Sean Verschaeve
options.abstract: Uncovering hidden conformational stereochemistry and dynamics arising from hindered amide rotation-induced chirality inside complex molecular assemblies.

options.title: Exploring Tm-Yb(-Nd)-doped LiLuF4 NPs as a novel downshifting NIR thermometer
options.author: Petryna Sofia
options.abstract: Investigating trivalent thulium, ytterbium, and neodymium co-doped lithium lutetium fluoride nanoparticles as high-sensitivity luminescent probes for near-infrared temperature sensing.

options.title: Biodegradable Na₃ZrF₇:Yb³⁺–Ho³⁺–Er³⁺ Nanoparticles as Luminescent Nanothermometers: From Downshifting Emission to Multifunctional Platforms
options.author: Abedi Tameh Fatemeh
options.abstract: Synthesis and optical characterization of biodegradable sodium zirconium fluoride nanothermometers co-doped with lanthanide ions for multi-functional biomedical imaging and thermal tracking.

options.title: Terahertz Spectroscopy of Covalent Organic Frameworks
options.author: Gitta Van Hoof
options.abstract: Employing ultra-fast terahertz spectroscopy to investigate the structural dynamics, vibration modes, and charge transport behaviors inside crystalline covalent organic frameworks (COFs).

options.title: Metal Organic Frameworks for Supercapacitors
options.author: Wafaa Ahmed Mohamed Moawad
options.abstract: Design, syntheses, and electrochemical performances of custom porous metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) engineered to maximize specific capacitances and cycle life in supercapacitor applications.

options.title: The Evaluation of Data Processing Methods for Macro-Raman Mapping of Art Objects
options.author: Rachael Britton
options.abstract: Master research poster detailing the evaluation of alternative statistical processing and baseline correction methods of high-resolution micro/macro-Raman spectral mapping of cultural heritage artifacts.

options.title: Hybrid Nanomaterials Combining Thermometry and Photodynamic Therapy
options.author: Brianna Woolery
options.abstract: Investigating multifunctional hybrid nanocomposites capable of synergistic optical temperature reading along with localized targeted photodynamic therapeutic excitation.

options.title: Determination of Multi-Elemental Paleoclimate Proxies in Bivalve Shells via LA-ICP-TOF-MS Mapping
options.author: Robbe Van Ryckeghem
options.abstract: Utilizing advanced high-speed laser ablation inductively coupled plasma time-of-flight mass spectrometry to map high-resolution trace elements on bivalve shell thin sections as paleotemperature proxies.

options.title: XRFPM: A Fundamental Parameter Based Code for the Analysis of XRF Spectra
options.author: Luca De Bruyn
options.abstract: Developing and compiling a lightweight, high-performance physical script utilizing fundamental parameter models for swift quantitative calibration and deconvolution of complex X-ray fluorescence spectra.

options.title: Atomic Layer Deposition of functional coatings for Lithium-Ion batteries
options.author: Mitch Bruyneel
options.abstract: Employing precise nanoscale atomic layer deposition (ALD) techniques to engineer uniform, ultra-thin protecting layers stabilizing cathode interfaces against degradation in rechargeable batteries.

options.title: Gallium Incorporation in In(As,P)/InP Quantum Dots with Molten Salt Processing
options.author: Ramón Coolens
options.abstract: Synthesizing and structural tracking of gallium introduction inside indium arsenide phosphide quantum dots using controlled high-temperature molten salt reactions.

options.title: Optimisation of Thiolated Self-Assembled Monolayers for Antibody Attachment to Gold Electrodes
options.author: Ruby Cornand
options.abstract: Systematic optimization of gold surface self-assembly dynamics using thiolated organic chains designed to promote bio-compatible, high-density receptor and antibody immobilization.

options.title: Analysis of Surface Orbitals in III-V Core Quantum Dot Alloys
options.author: Mattice Criel
options.abstract: Theoretical modeling and experimental benchmarking of the electronic structure, valence boundaries, and surface dangling orbital states in III-V semiconductor quantum dot core-shell structures.

options.title: Dynamic poly(norbornene) networks making use of γ-hydroxy amide chemistry
options.author: Kenny Deré
options.abstract: Developing recyclable, self-healing polymer materials utilizing dynamic covalent exchange crossings based on retro-active γ-hydroxy amide reactions inside substituted norbornene backbones.

options.title: From Strong to Weak Magnetic Fields: Characterizing the Evolution and Persistence of Exotic Magnetic Effects
options.author: Thibo Van Eeckhoorn
options.abstract: Investigating high-field and low-field magnetic susceptibility alignments, and tracking structural phase changes with persistent macroscopic electronic interactions.

options.title: Modified gelatin as a biodegradable gene delivery system
options.author: Kobe De Bruyne
options.abstract: Synthesizing responsive chemically-modified gelatin nanopolyplexes as safe, non-toxic, and biological-stimuli micro-carriers for targeted intracellular gene therapeutics.

options.title: Ga Alloying in InAs Quantum Dots Enabling SWIR Emission
options.author: Wiebe Volckaert
options.abstract: Tuning structural bandgaps to enable deep short-wave infrared (SWIR) luminescence through precise gallium alloying on indium-arsenide crystal cores.

options.title: Statistical Characterization of Sampling Uncertainty in Maximal Probability Domains from Quantum Computing Wavefunctions
options.author: Yarno De Jaeger
options.abstract: Developing bounds and metrics for the estimation errors and sampling bounds of state probabilities drawn from simulated NISQ-era quantum computing wavefunctions.

options.title: Synthesis and biological evaluation of fluorinated morphine glucuronide analogues
options.author: Agir Verhulst
options.abstract: Synthesizing novel fluorinated organic structures imitating active morphine glucuronides to evaluate competitive biological receptor binding and structural metabolic stability.

options.title: Development of antioxidant hybrid hydrogel wound dressings via nanotechnology
options.author: Hannah Meuleman
options.abstract: Engineering highly bio-compatible hydrogel matrices embedded with antioxidant nanomaterials designed to actively scavenge reactive oxygen species (ROS) and accelerate wound recovery.
